========================================
 SHA-256 (1 000 hashes, pure LLVM, no libc)
 Optimizations applied:
   • K-table: internal constant [64 x i64] + GEP+load (was 64-BB branch tree)
   • Hex output: single 64-byte arena alloc + 64 inline byte stores (was 8 calls + 5 memcpy)
========================================

--- C (10 × 1 000 hashes = 10 000 total) ---

real	0m0.019s
user	0m0.012s
sys	0m0.008s

--- Onu (10 × 1 000 hashes = 10 000 total) ---

real	0m0.029s
user	0m0.013s
sys	0m0.017s

--- C vs Onu comparison ---
  C   user time : 0.012s
  Onu user time : 0.013s
  Onu / C ratio : 1.08×  (pure LLVM, no libc; arena allocator; x86_64 syscalls)

--- Correctness check (Onu == C for all 1 000 hashes) ---
PASS: all 1 000 digests are identical
